channel.title: Monitoring Minutes
channel.description: A briefing on Mexican monetary policy and macroeconomic developments, published whenever fresh data arrives. This AI-generated podcast transforms economic data into accessible insights, covering Banco de Mexico policy decisions, inflation trends, employment figures, and market expectations. Part of the Monitoring Monetary Policy in Mexico project, which demonstrates how automation and large language models can make specialized economic analysis more accessible and relevant.
channel.itunes:author: Alexander Dentler
channel.itunes:summary: A briefing on Mexican monetary policy and macroeconomic developments, published whenever fresh data arrives. This AI-generated podcast transforms economic data into accessible insights, covering Banco de Mexico policy decisions, inflation trends, employment figures, and market expectations. Part of the Monitoring Monetary Policy in Mexico project, which demonstrates how automation and large language models can make specialized economic analysis more accessible and relevant.

item.title: May 23, 2026 - Alexander Dentler & Ignacio Crane
item.description: Briefing on Mexican monetary policy for May 23, 2026. Host: Alexander Dentler. Analyst: Ignacio Crane. Topics covered: news roundup, economic data updates, and central bank calendar. Covers 8 news items and 4 data topics.
item.itunes:author: Alexander Dentler
item.itunes:summary: Briefing on Mexican monetary policy for May 23, 2026. Host: Alexander Dentler. Analyst: Ignacio Crane. Topics covered: news roundup, economic data updates, and central bank calendar. Covers 8 news items and 4 data topics.
